Fakülte

Üsküdar University Faculty of Communication Design Laboratory is located on the ground floor of Block A of the south campus in an area with special ventilation and cabling infrastructure. There are 30+1 computers in the laboratory. All 31 computers have RAM, processor and graphics card support with high configuration and processing capacity. In addition to all these, the laboratory also has a projection device and a smart projection system. Thus, all the possibilities of the digital age are shared with students.

Purpose of the Design Laboratory

The design laboratory is used in all of the application courses in the curriculum of the Cartoon and Animation, New Media and Communication and Radio, Television and Cinema departments. All the facilities of the design laboratory are utilized in the project production and development processes of courses such as two-dimensional animation, digital editing, editing techniques and introduction to coding in the curricula of the relevant departments.

All computers in this modern laboratory, which was established to meet all the needs that may arise in the applied courses in the curriculum of Cartoon and Animation, New Media and Communication and Radio, Television and Cinema departments, have advanced software and hardware support.

Usage Opportunities of the Design Laboratory

Our undergraduate students who continue their higher education at Üsküdar University have the opportunity to use the design laboratory outside of class. In addition, this laboratory, which has high-speed internet access, is an application area where graduate students can work with their instructors in their thesis studies and projects.
